title: Horizon Design System – ServiceNow UI Framework
content: Horizon from Directories: Components: Horizon is ServiceNow Design System, centralizing design guidance and resources. It fosters seamless connections across all platform applications, accelerating collaboration between designers, developers, and creators. Horizon includes pre-built, reusable assets and foundational design guidance to build exceptional experiences. ServiceNow Design System offers principles, foundation guidelines, component specs, best practice patterns, and resources like Figma libraries and learning programs, ensuring innovation and efficiency at an enterprise scale. Accessibility Color System Component overview Data visualization Elevation Figma Icons Illustrations Layout Patterns Spacing Styles Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Chip Date picker Dropdown Empty state Icon Label Link Menus Modal Pagination Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Switch Tabs Text area Text field Tooltip
